message:
fix(safety): exit code and log path bugs

1. CRITICAL: Exit code 1 now set for blocked commands in JSON mode
   - Wrapper scripts depend on exit code to detect blocked commands
   - Previously JSON mode always exited 0, making wrappers ineffective

2. Log file path now uses home directory
   - Changed DefaultBlockedLogPath to DefaultBlockedLogSubPath
   - Added defaultBlockedLogPath() helper to resolve ~/. path
   - Fixes: ntm safety blocked now works from any directory

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
